name: recon-core-portal
description: Recon Core — customer procurement portal (full-stack: Express + Prisma + SQLite API, Vite + React client)

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run setup && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm --prefix server run start
